title: Blatium Spellbooks
description: A small mod for compatibility Blatium and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
body:
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=CurseForge&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blatium-spellbooks)
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Modrinth&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blatium-spellbooks)

A small mod for compatibility [Blatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/blatium) and [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks).

Items in the mod are configured in the config (armor values, armor toughness, armor knockback resistance, mana max, spells count).

Blatium Mage and Nlium Mage armor absorbs half of the damage, fall damage, impact damage when flying on elites, fire damage, explosion damage and prevents drowning.

https://blatfan.carrd.co/
